title: PASSKEY_TOKENS in-memory HashMap lost on restart
description: File: src/webauthn.rs:PASSKEY_TOKENS. The one-time passkey tokens are stored in a static HashMap. If the server restarts between the WebAuthn ceremony completion and the OAuth form submit (within 2 minutes), the token is lost and login fails silently. This is probably fine for a single-instance server with a 2-minute TTL, but the failure mode is non-obvious — add a comment noting this tradeoff.
